title: Tcard_X6852-15.0.3.109SP09-OP001PF001AZ
description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
X6852-15.0.3.109SP09(OP001PF001AZ)

Android Version:
1. Upgraded from Android 14 to Android 15 for enhanced security, more features, and a better user experience.

OS Version:
1. Upgraded from XOS14.0.0 to XOS15.0.3 for a smarter user interface and a refreshed look for your device.

Home Screen:
1. Added batch processing for apps in the Edit mode, enabling users to uninstall apps or create folders in batch, enhancing app management efficiency.
2. Added options to resize certain app icons and folders to 1x2, 2x1, or 2x2 via long press and drag, enhancing home screen icon personalization.
3. Optimized animations for unlocking the home screen and app launch/exit transitions.

Notification Center:
1. Added privacy protection for lock screen notifications, showing content only after face unlock. Introduced adaptive notification settings that automatically reduce volume for high-frequency notifications over short periods.
2. Optimized screen wake intervals and animation design for notifications, balancing notification timeliness and a smooth visual experience.

AOD:
1. Optimized AOD activation method by removing the Raise to Wake option and retaining Tap to Wake option to extend battery life.

Control Center:
1. Added music cards to improve the interaction experience.
2. Optimized page layout and smoothness for a more refined display.

Font:
1. Added the TransSans font for a more comfortable reading experience.

Vogue Portraits:
1. Added Vogue Portraits wallpapers, using AI to identify the subject of a wallpaper and match it with artistic backgrounds, enriching personalization.

Phone:
1. Added support for merging duplicate contacts and removing duplicates.

Messages:
1. Added support for Dynamic Bar to display SMS verification codes.

Screenshot Pixelation:
1. Added AI-powered pixelation for screenshots to safeguard user privacy by automatically masking sensitive information, improving operational efficiency.

Dual System:
1. Added Dual System, two systems on one phone, with data isolation and support for switching between the two. The data of the main and second systems are isolated. Users can set different fingerprints and passwords for the main and second systems and switch between the two on the lock screen.

System Performance:
1. Optimized the memory recycling strategy to boost app loading speed.
2. Added priority scheduling for key tasks to enhance the system running smoothness under high CPU loads.

Instant Transfer:
1. Added Instant Transfer for quick transfer across phones and tablets of the same brand when images, videos, and files were shared, without data usage and installation.

Camera:
1. Optimized QR code scanning for higher accuracy and a better user experience.
2. Added a frame ratio of 16:9 for photos to achieve richer composition selections.

AI:
1. Added AI Ask About Screen for innovative and efficient interactions, with support for more large model features like photo-based problem solving and text-to-image generation.
2. Added Circle to Search: Long press the Home or navigation button to quickly search for selected content by circling, tapping, or swiping on the screen.
3. Upgraded AskAI to AI Writing: Provided a new cool update animation and interactive UI, and added text generation, rewriting in three styles, summarization, and spelling and grammar check, empowering every text input.
4. Added AI Artboard with five image generation styles: Japanese anime, American anime, mecha、game, allowing users to save generated images as files.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the XClub forum (https://www.infinix.club) for mor
